title: heuffelia sempervirens
intro: Heuffelia sempervirens, also known as Perennial Heuffel's Sage, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, helping to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Heuffelia sempervirens include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to ease respiratory problems. Heuffelia sempervirens can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
